response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, including relevant work with Java and agile methodologies, though his primary focus has been on other languages (TypeScript, D, etc.). His background in design and implementation of complex architectures, along with his enthusiasm for innovation and collaboration, aligns well with the role. However, his German proficiency is only basic, which may slightly hinder client interactions in the insurance sector.
strengths: Strong background in software architecture and design, with experience in complex, scalable systems
Proficiency in Java and object-oriented programming, alongside exposure to agile methodologies (TDD, CI/CD)
Enthusiastic about emerging technologies and innovation, demonstrated by contributions to open-source projects and workshops
concerns: Limited recent Java-focused work, with primary experience in TypeScript and D
Basic German language skills may impact client-facing responsibilities
Overqualified for an entry-level role, which could lead to disengagement or short tenure
